title: Residence
wikitext:
[]: Residence ( Spoilers? Probably not..) Post by wonderluster » Fri Aug 21, 2009 1:04 am So Shinji, and Asuka live with Misato, Penpen lives in a fridge, Touji and Kensuke live somewhere in the city, Rei lives in a bomb shelter. It has not been verifiried in NGE, it has not been verified in Rebuild. WHERE DOES GENDO LIVE?

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Aug 21, 2009 1:09 am In his office. He sleeps at his desk in his trademark pose. He doesn't need to eat because he's that much of a bad ass.

[]: Post by NemZ » Fri Aug 21, 2009 1:14 am Who says he sleeps?

[]: Re: Residence ( Spoilers? Probably not..) Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Aug 21, 2009 2:53 am wonderluster wrote: WHERE DOES GENDO LIVE?

[]: Re: Residence ( Spoilers? Probably not..) Post by LiLi » Fri Aug 21, 2009 4:45 am You know, that's a good question... I guess I always thought he lived in some anonymous apartment in Tokyo-3 but... maybe his office doubles as his dwelling (like Barbie's old plastic one). SaltyJoe wrote: I always took it for granted that he spends all his time at Nerv. At the very least, 2.0 showed us that he had a dining room set up in Nerv HQ. And i don't think that "business meals" are Gendo's style, so it's probably mostly for private use, no matter how huge it is for one person. He is like Bruce Wayne with the Batcave. And Fuyutski is Alfred.

[]: Post by trueno_twentyone » Fri Aug 21, 2009 5:24 am His office is not what you guys think. He has a king size bed an Olympic size pool a fully furbished kitchen Dolby surround 7.1 home theater with 50 seating capacity and more. All this in the convenience of his office. Talk about luxury!

[]: Re: Residence ( Spoilers? Probably not..) Post by schismatics » Fri Aug 21, 2009 8:44 am SaltyJoe"][quote="wonderluster wrote: He is like Bruce Wayne with the Batcave. And Fuyutski is Alfred.

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Fri Aug 21, 2009 9:16 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: In his office. He sleeps at his desk in his trademark pose. He doesn't need to eat because he's that much of a bad ass.

[]: Post by LiLi » Fri Aug 21, 2009 9:18 am master_lloyd wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: In his office. He sleeps at his desk in his trademark pose. He doesn't need to eat because he's that much of a bad ass.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Aug 21, 2009 9:55 am LiLi wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by wonderluster » Fri Aug 21, 2009 10:01 am I think we might actually get to find out in 3.0, cause in 2.0 Im pretty sure we got real close to finding out....Then an Angel attacked, and his limo went all Tokyo3 Drift on us.

[]: Re: Residence ( Spoilers? Probably not..) Post by carla » Fri Aug 21, 2009 11:48 am LiLi wrote: maybe his office doubles as his dwelling (like Barbie's old plastic one).

[]: Post by Teague » Fri Aug 21, 2009 12:03 pm He sleeps in an inflatable bed floating on the Reiquarium

[]: Post by Holy Diver » Fri Aug 21, 2009 12:13 pm I think that he has a fully furnished living space inside headquarters. It would have all of the comforts of home, but without the commute to work.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Aug 21, 2009 12:37 pm Teague wrote: He sleeps in an inflatable bed floating on the Reiquarium

[]: Post by Ornette » Fri Aug 21, 2009 4:37 pm wonderluster wrote: I think we might actually get to find out in 3.0, cause in 2.0 Im pretty sure we got real close to finding out....Then an Angel attacked, and his limo went all Tokyo3 Drift on us.

[]: Re: Residence ( Spoilers? Probably not..) Post by NAveryW » Fri Aug 21, 2009 4:45 pm wonderluster wrote: Rei lives in a bomb shelter.

[]: Post by Xard » Fri Aug 21, 2009 4:56 pm Yeah, Rei's apartment is more of a slum/to be teared down area (the deteoriating buildings, sounds outside that come from some sort of heavy machinery). It is apartment house, not some "bomb shelter" also /r/ing pic of Gendo sleeping in puci eva

[]: Post by wonderluster » Fri Aug 21, 2009 5:23 pm Looks about as well kept as a bomb shelter. lol.

[]: Post by Marduk » Fri Aug 21, 2009 6:20 pm I don't think there were any other important places for Gendo to go to in Tokyo-3, so I think that limo really was heading to wherever he lived. (That, or Anno just wanted to remind us of how badass Gendo is =P ) EDIT: Just watched it again; maybe he was headed for Matsushiro to overlook things =| But then again, maybe not. If he really did want to be there he'd usually be the first on the scene.
